# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: config-cache
        with:
          path: |
            .env.local
            .env.development
            .env.production
            config/*.json
            config/*.yaml
            config/*.yml
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: build-cache
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next
            target
            __pycache__
            *.pyc
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          npm test
          python -m pytest

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: |
            dist
            build
          retention-days: 7

  deploy:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Restore node modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore build cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output

      - name: Deploy
        run: echo "Deploying application..."
